name: Quaderno
description: Global tax compliance API for calculation, invoicing, and cross-border VAT/GST.

seo.title: Quaderno — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Quaderno: Global tax compliance API for calculation, invoicing, and cross-border VAT/GST.

when_to_use: Calculating VAT/GST on digital goods across 60+ countries
Generating compliant invoices with automatic tax line items
Cross-border GST compliance for SaaS sold globally

pros: Clean API for tax calc, invoicing, VAT/GST
Good fit for SaaS/digital goods sellers
cons: Product pace slowed in recent years
Coverage gaps vs full enterprise tax engines
No serious US sales tax remittance
Limited support hours on lower tiers
review.verdict: Still a decent cross-border tax API for small digital sellers — watch roadmap before scaling heavily.
review.best_for: Indie SaaS and digital product sellers needing compliant VAT/GST invoices via an API.
review.not_for: Larger SaaS with heavy US sales tax exposure or enterprise audit requirements.
